briefing: Happy Friday, March 20th! The KOSPI is navigating extreme volatility. Following a 2.73% slide on March 19th—driven by geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices—the market remains on edge. The won hit a 17-year low near 1,500/USD, adding pressure. Tech heavyweights like Samsung and SK Hynix saw significant pullbacks, though long-term outlooks from Goldman Sachs remain bullish (7,000 target). 'Spectrosynthesis Seoul' opens today at Art Sonje Center amidst a busy art calendar.
